domain: home appliance repair hardware, washing-machine/dryer fixtures, refrigerator mechanisms, dishwasher parts, and service alignment tools

ideas.idea_title: Washing Machine Drum Spider Arm Replacement Hub
ideas.product_context: Front-load washing machines use a cast metal spider assembly to connect the drum to the drive shaft and support high-speed spin loads.
ideas.core_function: Transmit torque from the drive shaft to the drum while keeping the drum centered under wet laundry imbalance.
ideas.likely_main_part: Three-arm radial hub with central splined bore, raised bearing land, ribbed arms, and bolt bosses at each arm end.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines radial symmetry, tapered organic arms, filleted ribs, coaxial bores, bolt patterns, and nonuniform boss geometry in one machined part.

ideas.product_context: Belt-driven clothes dryers use an idler pulley bracket to maintain belt tension against the rotating drum.
ideas.core_function: Hold a pulley axle at a precise offset while allowing spring-loaded belt tensioning.
ideas.likely_main_part: Bent plate-style bracket with pivot hole, pulley axle boss, spring hook tab, reinforcing flange, and slotted mounting hole.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires flat plate features, bends or stepped offsets, asymmetric holes, tab details, slots, and load-bearing bosses with clear mechanical relationships.

ideas.idea_title: Refrigerator Door Hinge Cam Lift Block
ideas.product_context: Many refrigerator doors use hinge cams to lift and self-close the door during the final swing angle.
ideas.core_function: Create a controlled rising cam path that helps the door close and compress the gasket evenly.
ideas.likely_main_part: Cylindrical hinge insert with spiral ramp surface, central pivot bore, keyed anti-rotation notch, and wear pads.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Challenges CAD representation with helical or ramped cam geometry, coaxial features, keyed cutouts, contact surfaces, and precise angular transitions.

ideas.idea_title: Dishwasher Upper Rack Height Adjuster Rail Block
ideas.product_context: Adjustable dishwasher racks use sliding blocks and detents to raise or lower the upper rack for tall dishes.
ideas.core_function: Guide the rack support through multiple height positions and lock it into stable detent stops.
ideas.likely_main_part: Molded or machined guide block with vertical channel, detent pockets, latch window, roller pin holes, and rail engagement ribs.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Includes nested channels, repeated detent forms, thin ribs, through-holes, rectangular cutouts, and features that must align on multiple faces.

ideas.idea_title: Washing Machine Motor Alignment Shim Gauge
ideas.product_context: Service technicians need alignment tools when replacing belt-drive motors or adjusting pulley tracking in washers.
ideas.core_function: Set the motor mounting height and pulley offset relative to the drum pulley during service.
ideas.likely_main_part: Stepped gauge plate with reference ledges, offset measurement fingers, elongated bolt clearance slots, and engraved depth marks.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests stepped planar geometry, thin precision fingers, slot placement, measurement references, chamfers, and dimensional intent across multiple offsets.

ideas.idea_title: Refrigerator Ice Maker Ejector Shaft Coupler
ideas.product_context: Automatic ice makers use a rotating ejector shaft to push formed cubes from the tray into the bin.
ideas.core_function: Couple a small drive motor output to the ejector shaft while absorbing minor misalignment.
ideas.likely_main_part: Short cylindrical coupler with D-bore on one side, cross-slot socket on the other, retaining groove, and flexible relief cuts.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines two different internal drive profiles, grooves, relief slots, concentric cylinders, and small toleranced coupling features.

ideas.product_context: Rotating dishwasher spray arms ride on a central turret that feeds water while allowing low-friction rotation.
ideas.core_function: Support the spray arm, seal the water path, and provide a bearing surface for smooth rotation.
ideas.likely_main_part: Vertical turret fitting with stepped cylindrical body, central water bore, radial outlet ports, snap-ring groove, and flange base.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires coaxial stepped solids, internal flow passages, radial holes intersecting a central bore, retaining grooves, and seal-seat geometry.

ideas.idea_title: Dryer Drum Roller Axle Support Bracket
ideas.product_context: Clothes dryer drums are supported by rollers mounted to brackets inside the cabinet.
ideas.core_function: Hold the roller axle square to the drum path while resisting vibration and thermal cycling.
ideas.likely_main_part: Stamped-style support bracket with upright axle boss, triangular gussets, base mounting slots, locating tabs, and raised embosses.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests angled gussets, bosses rising from sheet-like geometry, slots, tabs, emboss-like raised areas, and relationships between thin and thick features.

ideas.product_context: Top-load washers use suspension rods and springs that may need service alignment after tub or rod replacement.
ideas.core_function: Clamp around a suspension rod to hold a temporary calibration height while springs are checked or replaced.
ideas.likely_main_part: Split collar clamp with semicircular bore, hinge knuckle, screw boss, height reference stop, and anti-slip inner ridges.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Includes split circular geometry, hinge barrels, screw clearance and threaded boss regions, small internal ridges, and asymmetric clamp details.

ideas.product_context: Replacement refrigerator compressors often need vibration-isolating spacers or adapters to match cabinet mounting holes.
ideas.core_function: Adapt compressor foot geometry to the cabinet base while maintaining level height and rubber grommet compression.
ideas.likely_main_part: Low rectangular spacer block with raised circular grommet seat, countersunk mounting hole, offset locating pin, and underside relief pocket.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests mixed prismatic and cylindrical features, countersinks, offset pins, underside pockets, filleted load surfaces, and clear top-bottom feature orientation.
